before_code:
/* ADC Peripheral Register Map - adc_regs.h */
#ifndef ADC_REGS_H
#define ADC_REGS_H

#include <stdint.h>

typedef struct {
    volatile uint32_t CR1;       /* Control register 1       offset: 0x00 */
    volatile uint32_t CR2;       /* Control register 2       offset: 0x04 */
    volatile uint32_t SMPR1;     /* Sample time register 1   offset: 0x08 */
    volatile uint32_t SMPR2;     /* Sample time register 2   offset: 0x0C */
    volatile uint32_t HTR;       /* Watchdog high threshold  offset: 0x10 */
    volatile uint32_t LTR;       /* Watchdog low threshold   offset: 0x14 */
    volatile uint32_t SQR1;      /* Regular sequence reg 1   offset: 0x18 */
    volatile uint32_t DR;        /* Data register            offset: 0x1C */
} ADC_Regs_t;

#define ADC1  ((ADC_Regs_t *)0x40012400U)
#define ADC2  ((ADC_Regs_t *)0x40012800U)

#endif /* ADC_REGS_H */
patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-/* ADC Peripheral Register Map - adc_regs.h */
+/* ADC Peripheral Register Map - adc_regs.h (BREAKING: fields added mid-struct) */
 #ifndef ADC_REGS_H
 #define ADC_REGS_H
 
@@ -12,7 +12,10 @@
     volatile uint32_t HTR;       /* Watchdog high threshold  offset: 0x10 */
     volatile uint32_t LTR;       /* Watchdog low threshold   offset: 0x14 */
     volatile uint32_t SQR1;      /* Regular sequence reg 1   offset: 0x18 */
-    volatile uint32_t DR;        /* Data register            offset: 0x1C */
+    /* BREAKING: new registers inserted before DR - shifts DR to 0x24 */
+    volatile uint32_t SQR2;      /* Regular sequence reg 2   offset: 0x1C */
+    volatile uint32_t SQR3;      /* Regular sequence reg 3   offset: 0x20 */
+    volatile uint32_t DR;        /* Data register            offset: 0x24 */
 } ADC_Regs_t;
 
 #define ADC1  ((ADC_Regs_t *)0x40012400U)
